hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "入力待ちです" with title "Claude Code" subtitle "回答が必要です" sound name "Glass"'
osascript -e 'display notification "タスクが完了しました" with title "Claude Code" subtitle "作業完了" sound name "Hero"'

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.id'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); in_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); out_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0'); printf "%s (%s) | Ctx: %.1f%% | In: %s Out: %s | $%.4f" "$name" "$id" "${used:-0}" "$in_tok" "$out_tok" "$cost"
